title: Baroque Works Moves in Secret
description: On pages 15–18, this part focuses on baroque works moves in secret, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Baroque Works Moves in Secret. The crew reaches Yuba and sees what the drought and rebellion have done to the people who still believe in Alabasta. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Once you've carried out those orders,

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: This kingdom shall crumble on its own...!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: And once the rebels and citizens of Alabama have lost their place to go,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: They too, will fall into the hands of Baroque Works!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Within a single night,

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: This country shall become our "Utopia!"

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Operation Utopia will be the last and greatest plan carried out by Baroque Works!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Failure will not be tolerated.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: The operation will begin tomorrow morning at 7!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Roger...!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I pray for our success.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Forgive me for the shameful sight yesterday, Vivi...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Oh, you don't need to apologize for that.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Well... We'll be off then, Toto.

dialogue.speaker: Toto
dialogue.text: Right...

dialogue.speaker: Toto
dialogue.text: Oh Luffy, take this with you.

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: Water!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Water!?

dialogue.speaker: Baroque Works agent
dialogue.text: You managed to find some!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yes. Shortly after you fell asleep while digging that hole,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I finally managed to reach a layer of moist earth...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The water I gave you is from distilling a portion of that.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Thanks, mister! I didn't really understand all that stuff you just said but I'll treasure this water!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It's genuine Yuba water... I'm sorry there isn't anymore to give than that right now...

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: LUFFY! What do you think you're doing!?

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: Mmm...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: ...? Is something wrong, Luffy?

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: I quit.

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: What?

summary: This part develops baroque works moves in secret and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
